conjecture: Against a frozen cross-product battery that was not executed before registration, the candidate will close all three deterministic gaps, detect every unsafe counterexample, preserve existing sequence and three-valued export semantics, and fail when a destructive tool call is injected into a safe trace.
kill_condition: Kill if unresolved_mechanism_groups > 0, unsafe_counterexample_detection_rate < 1.0, the frozen baseline does not expose all three claimed gaps, the same-spec destructive-call injection does not break the harness, positive replay does not restore it, or any declared regression guard fails.
prior_measurement_boundary: The branch had ordinary tests and a smaller receipt before this registration. This confirmatory claim is limited to the newly frozen cross-product battery and baseline differential encoded by the newly hashed harness; earlier results remain exploratory support and are not relabeled as preregistered.
oracle_boundary: MemoryBackend provides actual ship-query-readback but shares the process with the producer. Phoenix HTTP uses a recording opener. Neither is external-service corroboration.
